prebuiltTemplates.sectionSubtitle: Pick a professionally designed template — fully customisable in the form builder
prebuiltTemplates.minimalCleanDesc: A sleek, distraction-free form with a single-column layout. Perfect for quick registrations.
prebuiltTemplates.corporateProfessionalDesc: A structured business form with name, company, role, and country fields. Ideal for corporate events.
prebuiltTemplates.creativeGradientDesc: A vibrant, eye-catching form with gradient accents and playful copy. Great for creative events.
prebuiltTemplates.elegantDarkDesc: A premium dark-themed form with gold accents. Designed for exclusive invitations and galas.
prebuiltTemplates.conferenceDesc: A comprehensive multi-section form with personal and professional details. Built for large events.
prebuiltTemplates.socialFunDesc: A warm, friendly form with emoji accents and guest count. Perfect for parties and celebrations.
prebuiltTemplates.workshopTrainingDesc: A goal-oriented form with experience level and learning objectives. Ideal for workshops.
prebuiltTemplates.galaVipDesc: A sophisticated form with seating preference and dress code. Made for formal evenings.
